UI_trait_NL_ByakuganDesc: Possesses the Byakugan, enhancing perception, foraging, and Gentle Fist.
UI_trait_NL_SharinganDesc: Possesses the Sharingan, which evolves through combat and consumes chakra while active.
UI_trait_NL_SenjuDesc: Possesses exceptional vitality, chakra reserves, and Wood Release.
UI_trait_NL_RinneganDesc: Possesses the Rinnegan, enhancing perception and granting Shinra Tensei.
UI_trait_NL_UzumakiDesc: Possesses exceptional durability, chakra reserves, and sealing techniques.
UI_NL_Ability_Byakugan_Desc: Toggle Byakugan: Greatly expands perception and vision.
UI_NL_Ability_Sharingan_Desc: Toggle Sharingan: Evolve through combat to dodge attacks.
UI_NL_Ability_Kamui_Desc: Phase out of danger for a short time.
UI_NL_Ability_ShinraTensei_Desc: Repel nearby zombies with overwhelming force.
UI_NL_Ability_BindingRoots_Desc: Mokuton: Bind and stagger nearby zombies.
UI_NL_Ability_CreationRebirth_Desc: Rapidly heals wounds at a severe chakra cost.
UI_NL_CreationRebirthStudyFailed: The secrets of Creation Rebirth remain beyond your grasp
UI_NL_Error_NotEnoughChakra_ShinraTensei: Not enough chakra for Shinra Tensei
UI_NL_Error_NotEnoughChakra_BindingRoots: Not enough chakra for Binding Roots
UI_NL_Error_NotEnoughChakra_CreationRebi: Too exhausted (low chakra) for Creation Rebirth
UI_NL_Error_CreationRebirthLocked: Creation Rebirth has not been mastered
UI_NL_Error_CreationRebirthMaxChakra: At least 500 maximum chakra is required to study Creation Rebirth
UI_NL_Error_NotEnoughChakra_PlaceAlarmSe: Not enough chakra to place Alarm Seal
UI_NL_Error_NotEnoughChakra_StorageSeal: Not enough chakra for Storage Seal
UI_NL_Error_AbilityRequestTimedOut: The server did not confirm the technique.
UI_NL_HandSigns_ClassicDisabled: Enter this sequence on the numeric keypad
UI_NL_HandSigns_Busy: Cannot perform hand signs right now
UI_NL_Moodle_Chakra_Low_Desc: Your chakra is low (<30%). Consider meditating.
UI_NL_Moodle_Chakra_Critical_Desc: Your chakra is critical (<10%). Sustained powers will fail soon.
UI_NL_Moodle_Mangekyo_Desc: Mangekyo Sharingan awakened. Kamui is available.
UI_NL_Moodle_KamuiVision_L1_Desc: Kamui has strained your vision. Recovery: 1 in-game hour.
UI_NL_Moodle_KamuiVision_L2_Desc: Repeated Kamui use has damaged your vision. Recovery: 6 in-game hours.
UI_NL_Moodle_KamuiVision_L3_Desc: Kamui overuse has severely damaged your vision. Recovery: 1 full in-game day.
UI_NL_Moodle_KamuiVision_L4_Desc: Kamui overuse has severely damaged your vision. Recovery: 1 full in-game day.
UI_NL_Error_JutsuNotLearned: You have not completed training for this technique.
UI_NL_Error_NoFacingTarget: No visible target is in range.
UI_NL_Error_EarthWallBlocked: There is no clear edge for Earth Wall.
UI_NL_Discipline_Genjutsu_Desc: Deception, stealth, misdirection, fear, and psychological pressure.
UI_NL_Discipline_Ninjutsu_Desc: General chakra techniques, body enhancement, and practical combat casting.
UI_NL_Discipline_Taijutsu_Desc: Body mastery, conditioning, endurance, and direct movement.
UI_NL_Discipline_Kenjutsu_Desc: Weapon discipline, training, maintenance, and battlefield reliability.
UI_NL_Discipline_Medical_Desc: Healing, wound control, stabilization, and precise body disruption.
UI_NL_Discipline_Fuinjutsu_Desc: Seals, preparation, alarms, storage, and controlled utility.
UI_NL_Discipline_SenninMode_Desc: Ancient sage techniques, environmental absorption, and natural energy manipulation.
UI_NL_Discipline_Kinjutsu_Desc: Forbidden techniques, severe backlash, dark secrets, and high-risk manipulation.
UI_NL_Discipline_PuppetMaster_Desc: Puppet manufacturing, thread connection, multi-puppet mastery, and poison mechanisms.
UI_NL_Discipline_GeneExperimentation_Des: Cellular modification, DNA synthesis, physical restructuring, and experimental enhancements.
UI_NL_Discipline_Jinchuuriki_Desc: Tailed beast container, cloak transformations, dense chakra reserves, and beast bombs.
UI_NL_Discipline_StandardLockedDesc: You do not yet understand this discipline. Perhaps something in the ninja world can reveal this path.
UI_NL_Node_smoke_bomb_Desc: Detonate a smoke bomb at your current position.
UI_NL_Node_false_sound_Desc: Create a misleading sound ahead of you to draw zombies away.
UI_NL_Node_bringer_of_darkness_Desc: Blind nearby enemies caught within a wide area at the moment of casting.
UI_NL_Node_killing_intent_Desc: Release hostile intent that interrupts nearby enemies.
UI_NL_Node_physical_reinforcement_Desc: Reinforce your body to resist fatigue and recover endurance.
UI_NL_Node_chakra_focus_Desc: Stabilize your mind and reduce panic and stress.
UI_NL_Node_calorie_control_Desc: Ignite your metabolism, rapidly consuming chakra to satisfy hunger and thirst. Has a long cooldown once finished.
UI_NL_Node_katon_Desc: Expel fire-natured chakra in a forward cone, incinerating everything in your path.
UI_NL_Node_earth_wall_Desc: Raise a temporary stone wall directly ahead that blocks movement and incoming projectiles.
UI_NL_Node_shadow_close_Desc: Close distance rapidly while leaving a misleading sound behind.
UI_NL_Node_strength_chunin_Desc: Strength develops faster and shoves become more reliable.
UI_NL_Node_fitness_chunin_Desc: Fitness develops faster and endurance recovery improves.
UI_NL_Node_combat_body_chunin_Desc: Pain and exhaustion interfere less with movement.
UI_NL_Node_combat_body_jonin_Desc: Remain combat-capable longer during extended fights.
UI_NL_Node_blade_genin_Desc: Long and short blade skills develop slightly faster.
UI_NL_Node_blade_chunin_Desc: Long and short blade skills develop faster.
UI_NL_Node_blade_jonin_Desc: Long and short blade skills develop significantly faster.
UI_NL_Node_blunt_genin_Desc: Long and short blunt skills develop slightly faster.
UI_NL_Node_blunt_chunin_Desc: Long and short blunt skills develop faster.
UI_NL_Node_blunt_jonin_Desc: Long and short blunt skills develop significantly faster.
UI_NL_Node_polearm_genin_Desc: Axe and spear skills develop slightly faster.
UI_NL_Node_polearm_chunin_Desc: Axe and spear skills develop faster.
UI_NL_Node_polearm_jonin_Desc: Axe and spear skills develop significantly faster.
UI_NL_Node_maintenance_chunin_Desc: Maintenance develops faster and weapons become more reliable.
UI_NL_Node_maintenance_jonin_Desc: Maintenance develops significantly faster and weapons last longer.
UI_NL_Node_minor_healing_Desc: Repair light wounds and improve minor injury recovery.
UI_NL_Node_chakra_needle_Desc: Strike the closest visible target with precise medical chakra.
UI_NL_Node_cell_stimulation_Desc: Reduce fatigue and pain through accelerated recovery.
UI_NL_Node_nervous_system_shock_Desc: Damage and heavily disrupt nearby visible targets.
UI_NL_Node_field_surgery_Desc: Stabilize a major wound and apply a disposable chakra bandage.
UI_NL_Node_bleeding_suppression_Desc: Stop active bleeding and temporarily prevent renewed blood loss.
UI_NL_Node_alarm_seal_Desc: Prepare one-shot seals that warn their owner when zombies enter the area.
UI_NL_Node_storage_seal_Desc: Seal one container and its contents into a prepared scroll.
UI_NL_Node_corpse_odor_conditioning_Desc: While active, prevents sickness from rotting bodies at a minor chakra cost.
UI_NL_Node_blood_extraction_Desc: Allows the player to extract blood samples from Zombie Ninja corpses.
UI_NL_Node_ocular_extraction_Desc: Allows the player to extract ocular tissue from Zombie Ninja corpses.
UI_NL_Node_gene_extraction_Desc: Allows the player to extract gene samples from Zombie Ninja corpses.
UI_NL_AutopsyComplete: You found abnormal chakra pathways in the corpse.
UI_NL_GeneExperimentationRevealed: You sense chakra lingering in the corpse.
UI_NL_Social_NoTeam: You do not currently belong to a team.
UI_NL_Social_ConfirmDisbandVillage: Disband this village? This will remove all village teams, cancel village missions, clear village-owned reputation flags, and remove all members from the village.
UI_NL_Social_ConfirmLeaveVillage: Leave this village? You will be removed from your village team and lose village protection.
UI_NL_Social_ConfirmLeaveVillageDeserter: Leaving during an active mission will mark you as a deserter.
UI_NL_Social_ConfirmLeaveVillageBetrayal: Leaving now will betray the active mission and punish the whole team.
UI_NL_Social_MissionDeserted: You deserted your active mission and received a Deserter flag.
UI_NL_Social_MissionBetrayed: You betrayed the active mission. The mission failed and your team is now leaderless.
UI_NL_Social_VillageTeamNotice: This team belongs to a village and may remain leaderless.
UI_NL_Social_VillageInvitePrompt: %1 invites you to join their hidden village.

UI_NL_Social_Error_team_full: The team already has three members.
UI_NL_Social_Error_village_team_locked: Village-team management is not available yet.
UI_NL_Social_Error_no_team: You do not belong to a team.
UI_NL_Social_Error_no_village: You do not belong to a village.
UI_NL_Social_Error_kage_cannot_leave: The Kage cannot leave while succession and village disband are unavailable.
UI_NL_Social_Error_invalid_target: That team member is no longer available.
UI_NL_Social_Error_rank_required: Only a Kage-ranked shinobi can found a village.
UI_NL_Social_Error_already_has_village: You already belong to a village.
UI_NL_Social_Error_target_has_village: That player already belongs to a village.
UI_NL_Social_Error_not_kage: Only the Kage can do that.
UI_NL_Social_Error_invalid_symbol: That village symbol is not registered.
UI_NL_Social_Error_village_symbol_taken: That village symbol is already in use.
UI_NL_Social_Error_teammate_has_village: A teammate already belongs to another village.
UI_NL_Social_Error_wrong_target: That invitation was not addressed to you.
UI_NL_Social_Error_inviter_team_changed: The inviter's team changed before acceptance.
UI_NL_Social_Error_server_error: The social system encountered a server error.
UI_NL_Social_Error_mission_cleanup_unava: Village missions could not be cleaned up safely.
UI_NL_Social_Error_village_title_taken: That Kage title is already in use.
UI_NL_Social_Error_invalid_title: That Kage title is not valid.
UI_NL_Social_PromptAddMembers: Empty team created. Click the slots to add members.
UI_NL_Reputation_NoOwnedFlags: Your village has no active reputation flags.
UI_NL_Social_Error_invalid_flag_type: That reputation flag type is invalid.
UI_NL_Social_Error_flag_not_found: That reputation flag no longer exists.
UI_NL_Social_Error_unknown_player: That player is not in the known-player registry.
UI_NL_Mission_BoardEmpty: Your village has no posted or active missions.
UI_NL_Mission_NoActive: Your team has no active mission.
UI_NL_Mission_EmptyTeam: Assign at least one member before giving this team a mission.
UI_NL_Mission_NoAvailable: No generated missions are currently available.
UI_NL_Mission_RewardPreview: Reward: %1 Ninja XP per member / %2 Village XP
UI_NL_Mission_Confirm_missionComplete: Complete this mission and grant its rewards?
UI_NL_Mission_Confirm_missionFail: Mark this mission as failed with no rewards?
UI_NL_Mission_Confirm_missionCancel: Cancel this mission with no rewards or punishment?
UI_NL_Mission_Error_unstable_identity: A stable Steam ID or username is required.
UI_NL_Mission_Error_not_kage: Only the village leader can manage missions.
UI_NL_Mission_Error_invalid_team: That team does not belong to your village.
UI_NL_Mission_Error_empty_team: A team must have at least one member for this action.
UI_NL_Mission_Error_team_has_active_miss: That team already has an active mission.
UI_NL_Mission_Error_rank_locked: That mission rank has not been unlocked by your village.
UI_NL_Mission_Error_invalid_title: Mission titles must contain 1 to 64 characters.
UI_NL_Mission_Error_invalid_description: Mission descriptions must contain 1 to 500 characters.
UI_NL_Mission_Error_mission_not_active: That mission is no longer active.
UI_NL_Mission_Error_mission_not_availabl: That generated mission is no longer available.
UI_NL_Mission_Error_mission_not_posted: That mission is no longer posted.
UI_NL_Mission_Error_mission_already_post: That mission is already displayed on the board.
UI_NL_Mission_Error_not_team_leader: Only the team leader can accept a posted mission.
UI_NL_Mission_Error_automatic_mission: Generated missions complete automatically and cannot use that action.
